transcript:
CALLER: Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic hai na? Main ek appointment book karna chahta hoon ophthalmology ke liye.
AGENT: Haan ji, yeh Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic hai. Aapka naam aur contact number?
CALLER: Suresh Bhosale. Number 9823567890 hai.
AGENT: Theek hai Suresh ji. Dr. Manisha Rane eye specialist hain humare yahan. Is week koi bhi din chalega aapko?
CALLER: Kal — matlab Budhwaar — agar ho toh.
AGENT: Kal Budhwaar ko Dr. Rane 10 AM se 1 PM available hain. 11 AM ka slot khaali hai abhi.
CALLER: Perfect, 11 AM confirm kar do.
AGENT: Done! Suresh Bhosale, Budhwaar 11:00 AM, Dr. Manisha Rane. Aapko SMS aayega. Kuch aur?
CALLER: Nahi yaar, bas. Thanks!
